title: parosela mollis var. neomexicana
intro: Parosela mollis var. neomexicana, also known as New Mexico parosela, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Parosela mollis var. neomexicana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas and tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
